notes.label: auth_middleware_jwt
notes.content: Refactored glyphh_code/encoder.py auth middleware to validate JWT tokens. Added expiry check and signature verification. The handle_mcp_tool function now routes auth failures to a 401 response.

notes.label: db_migration_index
notes.content: Database migration adds composite index on glyph_vectors table for (org_id, model_id, level). This should speed up hierarchical embedding lookups by 10x. Changed domains/models/db_models.py and added alembic migration.

notes.label: session_encoder_design
notes.content: Designed the SESSION_ENCODER_CONFIG with 2 layers: content (0.60 weight) and context (0.40 weight). Content layer has identifiers and summary roles, both bag_of_words. Context layer has paths and symbols roles. Seed 73 to keep it independent from the file index encoder seed 42.

notes.label: studio_landing_cleanup
notes.content: Removed the code demo from glyphh-studio Landing.tsx and Compare.tsx pages. The DEMO_MODELS array now only has toolrouter and churn entries. Tagged as v1.0.2.

notes.label: bfcl_multi_turn
notes.content: Multi-turn scoring improved with Opus 4.5 by 11.37 points. The multi_turn_handler.py now tracks conversation state across turns. Key issue was that Haiku loses context after 3 turns.

notes.label: pipedream_app_routing
notes.content: Pipedream two-stage routing: extract_app() does string match with 5-word window, then filtered pgvector cosine search with 0.15 exact-slug bonus. App accuracy at 100%, action accuracy at 89.6% on 85K test queries.

notes.label: gql_query_optimization
notes.content: Optimized GQL FIND SIMILAR queries to use batch vector comparison instead of sequential. Reduced latency from 120ms to 35ms for typical 500-glyph collections. Changed gql/executor.py and gql/similarity.py.

notes.label: temporal_delta_tracking
notes.content: Added temporal delta tracking to the churn model. BeamSearchPredictor with beam_width=5 and drift_reduction=True. History of 4+ glyphs needed for reliable predictions. Trend statistics show autocorrelation of 0.7 for customer behavior.

notes.label: linguistics_morphology
notes.content: The MorphologyEngine uses learned transforms from seed pairs for plurals, past tense, gerunds, and comparatives. Transform is bundle of bind pairs. normalize() converts inflected forms back to base using HD algebra: bind(x, bind(x,y)) = y. MATCH_THRESHOLD at 0.20.

notes.label: settings_cleanup
notes.content: Cleaned up ~/.claude/settings.json — removed 125 accumulated allow entries, replaced with just defaultMode bypassPermissions. Project .claude/settings.json is now the single source of truth. Removed duplicate mcp__glyphh__* entry and legacy top-level permission keys.

notes.label: toolrouter_intent
notes.content: Toolrouter intent.py has 28 actions, 22 targets, 8 SaaS domains. Uses VERB_MAP with 120 entries, IMPACT_RANK for ambiguity resolution, and TARGET_MAP with 80 entries. Leading-verb priority and payment-verb domain pinning.

notes.label: faq_model_tests
notes.content: FAQ model has 36 tests passing. The intent.py is minimal at 90 lines — billing and shipping verb detection, payment and ticket domain signals, keyword extraction. Imports from local intent.py into encoder.py.
